subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I am Thy servant and the son of Thy servant. I have believed in Thee and in Thy most mighty signs, and have risen through Thy power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انی عبدک و ابن عبدک آمنت بک و بایاتک الکبری و قمت بحولک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
